title: SignalGuard AI — Violation Content Test Samples
description: 12 marketing content pieces with planted compliance and brand violations. Use these as test inputs for the SignalGuard review pipeline. Each sample has a known violation map for evaluation.

samples.content: FREE iPhone 17 Pro! Trade in any phone. America's fastest 5G. Text DEAL to 55555

planted_violations.description: 'FREE' without adjacent disclosure of plan requirement ($85.99/mo Unlimited Premium), trade-in conditions, or 36-month credit period
'FREE' used without immediately adjacent disclosure of conditions
'any phone' — only Apple/Samsung/Google in good condition qualify for full $1,099 credit
'fastest 5G' — superlative without cited independent source
'fastest' requires Ookla/J.D. Power citation within 18 months
Missing mandatory 'Msg&Data rates may apply'
Missing mandatory terms URL (novatel.com/terms)
Missing opt-out instructions ('Reply STOP to unsubscribe')

samples.content:
🚀 Ready for an upgrade? The iPhone 17 Pro is waiting for you — and it's $0!

NovaTel's 5G network is the best in wireless, delivering revolutionary speeds that will blow your mind. Our AI-powered network optimization ensures you always have the fastest connection.

Switch now and trade in your old phone for a brand-new iPhone 17 Pro completely FREE. Plus, enjoy truly unlimited data with no caps ever.

⏰ Don't miss out — this deal won't last forever!

Click here → novatel.com/iphone

*Terms apply. Visit novatel.com for full details. Trade-in req'd. Plan req'd. Bill credits over 36 mo.

planted_violations.description: '$0' in headline without adjacent disclosure of plan ($85.99/mo) and trade-in requirements
Material disclosures (*Terms line) placed after 'See More' fold on Facebook — not visible in initial view
'best in wireless' — superlative without cited source
'revolutionary' — prohibited word
'AI-powered' — should be 'AI-assisted'
'fastest connection' — superlative without citation
'truly unlimited with no caps' — Unlimited Premium does have video/hotspot limits
'Don't miss out' + 'won't last forever' — urgency pressure tactics
'Click here' — prohibited CTA
URL lacks UTM tracking parameters
Disclosure at bottom too vague — 'Plan req'd' doesn't name the plan or monthly cost

samples.content: At NovaTel, we empower businesses to leverage our robust 5G solution for seamless enterprise connectivity. Our industry-leading platform integrates seamlessly with your existing infrastructure, delivering game-changing results that drive digital transformation. Enterprise teams that deploy NovaTel report a 40% reduction in connectivity-related downtime. The ROI speaks for itself — our disruptive approach to wireless networking ensures best-in-class reliability with guaranteed uptime. Our synergy of cutting-edge hardware and AI-powered network management creates a paradigm shift for IT operations. Ready to revolutionize your connectivity? Click here to learn more: novatel.com/business

planted_violations.description: 'empower' — prohibited corporate jargon
'leverage' — prohibited verb
'robust' — prohibited vague term
'seamless/seamlessly' used TWICE — prohibited marketing filler
'industry-leading' — no third-party source cited
'game-changing' — prohibited hyperbole
'disruptive' — prohibited buzzword
'best-in-class' — no cited metric or source
'guaranteed uptime' — prohibited word
'synergy' — prohibited corporate jargon
'AI-powered' — should be 'AI-assisted'
'40% reduction in downtime' — no source, methodology, sample size cited
Single wall-of-text paragraph — LinkedIn requires 1-2 sentences per paragraph with white space
'Click here' — prohibited CTA
'learn more' — prohibited CTA
URL lacks UTM parameters

samples.content:
Subject: You're overpaying Verizon by 25% every month 💸

Hi [First Name],

Still on Verizon? We ran the numbers, and you're throwing away $300/year on overpriced wireless. That's a vacation fund, not a phone bill.

Switch to NovaTel today and we'll hand you a $200 Visa prepaid card just for making the smart move. Bring your own phone — no trade-in needed, no hassle.

NovaTel delivers the fastest, most reliable 5G in your area with truly unlimited data. No throttling, no surprises, no games.

What are you waiting for? The clock is ticking.

Click here to switch → novatel.com/switch

— The NovaTel Team

P.S. — This offer is risk-free. Guaranteed satisfaction or your money back.

planted_violations.description: Names competitor 'Verizon' directly in advertising copy — prohibited
'25%' savings claim without comparison basis — which Verizon plan tier? Are bundled perks factored in?
'$300/year' savings without stating comparison methodology or AutoPay requirements
'fastest, most reliable' — two superlatives without any cited source
'truly unlimited — no throttling' — Unlimited Extra (req'd plan) has 75GB deprioritization
'clock is ticking' — urgency pressure language
'Click here' — prohibited CTA
CTA text is not from approved list
No tracked URL (no UTM parameters)
Missing full T&C link as required for email channel
Missing plan name and credit period details in email body
'guaranteed satisfaction' — prohibited word
'risk-free' — implies no conditions exist, similar to 'no strings attached'

samples.content:
Ditch Your Old Internet Provider and Experience NovaTel's Revolutionary 5G Home Internet That Changes Everything

Tired of buffering? NovaTel 5G Home Internet delivers blazing-fast speeds up to 1 Gbps — making your old cable connection look like dial-up.

Starting at just $25/month.

✅ No data caps — truly unlimited
✅ No annual contracts — cancel anytime
✅ Self-install in 15 minutes — no technician needed
✅ Works everywhere in America

Over 2 million households have already made the switch. Join them and save up to 40% compared to traditional ISPs.

"NovaTel 5G Home Internet is the best thing that ever happened to our household. Streaming in 4K with zero buffering!" — Jennifer M., Austin TX

[HUGE GREEN BUTTON: Get Started Now!]

---
*Terms and conditions apply. See novatel.com/terms for full details. Speeds may vary. 5G coverage subject to availability.

planted_violations.description: Headline exceeds 10-word maximum (15 words)
'revolutionary' — prohibited word
'up to 1 Gbps' — typical speeds are 72-245 Mbps per broadband label; peak speed misleading
Speed claim inconsistent with Broadband Label typical speeds; no methodology or date cited
'starting at $25/mo' — requires bundled phone plan ($65.99+/mo); standalone is $50/mo
'works everywhere in America' — only available in 200+ markets, not nationwide
'2 million households' — no source, date, or methodology cited
'save 40%' — no comparison baseline (which ISP, which tier, with or without bundles)
Customer testimonial without 'results may vary' disclaimer or written approval notation
Disclosure at bottom (*Terms) is below the fold, not in same viewport as claims
Price disclosure not proximal to '$25/mo' claim — no mention that phone plan is required
CTA button links to untracked URL

samples.content:
[STORY FRAME 1 - BOLD TEXT ON GRADIENT BACKGROUND]
🔥 $0 Galaxy S26! 🔥
Trade in your old phone
Swipe up!

[STORY FRAME 2 - PRODUCT IMAGE]
Free phone. Free shipping.
No strings attached.
novatel.com/galaxy

[STORY FRAME 3 - SMALL TEXT AT BOTTOM]
*Requires eligible plan. Trade-in and bill credits apply. See terms.

planted_violations.description: '$0' on Frame 1 without any disclosure on the same frame — Frame 3 terms are insufficient
On Instagram Stories, disclosures must appear on the SAME frame as the claim, not a separate frame
'Free phone' without adjacent plan/trade-in/credit period conditions
'No strings attached' — prohibited phrase
Frame 3 disclosure too vague — doesn't name plan, monthly cost, credit period, or eligible brands
URL lacks UTM tracking parameters
Emoji count exceeds 3 per post (4 fire/bolt emojis across frames)

samples.content:
FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE

NovaTel's Disruptive 5G Home Internet Now Available Nationwide

DALLAS, TX — NovaTel Wireless, the best wireless carrier in America, today announced that its game-changing 5G Home Internet service is now available in all 50 states.

The service delivers industry-leading speeds and leverages NovaTel's robust network infrastructure to empower households with next-generation broadband.

"We're revolutionizing home internet," said Sarah Chen, CMO. "This is not an incremental improvement — it's a paradigm shift."

NovaTel 5G Home Internet is available starting at $25/mo and serves over 3 million customers nationwide.

Ready to make the switch? Sign up today at novatel.com/home!

About NovaTel Wireless
NovaTel Wireless is America's #1 5G carrier.

planted_violations.description: 'disruptive' — prohibited term
'best wireless carrier in America' — superlative without source
'game-changing' — prohibited
'industry-leading' — no source
'leverages' — prohibited verb
'robust' — prohibited
'empower' — prohibited
'revolutionizing' — prohibited
'starting at $25/mo' — doesn't disclose phone plan bundle requirement
'3 million customers' — no date qualifier ('as of [date]')
Press release has CTA 'Sign up today!' — press releases should not have CTAs in body
'#1 5G carrier' in boilerplate — no cited source
'all 50 states' — service is only in 200+ markets, not all 50 states

samples.content: 🎄 BOGO iPhone 17! Buy one, get one FREE! No catch! Shop now: novatel.com/bogo

planted_violations.description: BOGO with zero required disclosures: no mention of new line req, bill credits, 36-mo installment, early cancel penalty, or activation fee
'FREE' without adjacent conditions
'No catch' — equivalent to 'no strings attached', prohibited
Missing ALL mandatory BOGO disclosures per §8
Missing 'Msg&Data rates may apply'
Missing terms URL and opt-out instructions
URL lacks UTM tracking parameters

samples.content:
Subject: 🎓 Student deal: Unlimited for $37.99/mo

Hey!

College is expensive. Your phone bill doesn't have to be.

NovaTel's Student Unlimited plan gives you everything you need:
• Unlimited data on our award-winning 5G network
• 30GB hotspot for studying anywhere
• Video streaming in crystal-clear quality

All for just $37.99/mo — that's 50% off our regular price.

No contracts. No activation fees. No hidden charges.

Get started → novatel.com/student

— Team NovaTel

To unsubscribe, reply STOP.

planted_violations.description: CRITICAL: No disclosure that $37.99 is promotional for 48 months, reverting to $75.99/mo automatically
No disclosure that annual student verification via SheerID is required to maintain price
'unlimited data' without deprioritization disclosure — Unlimited Extra has 75GB threshold
No mention of speed reduction during congestion after 75GB
'award-winning' — no specific award name, date, or awarding body cited
'Video streaming in crystal-clear quality' — doesn't disclose 720p HD limit on this plan tier
Missing full T&C link as required for email
Missing plan name ('Unlimited Extra Student') — just says 'Student Unlimited'
URL lacks UTM tracking parameters

samples.content:
👨‍👩‍👧‍👦 Family of 4? Get unlimited wireless for just $25/line!

That's $100/mo total for the whole family — with unlimited everything!

NovaTel's family plan includes:
✅ Unlimited data, talk & text
✅ 5G access
✅ Hotspot included

You'll save $500/year compared to what you're paying now.

Switch your family today → novatel.com/family

Every family deserves the best network. Period.

planted_violations.description: 'unlimited everything' without deprioritization disclosure — Starter plan is always deprioritized
No disclosure of speed management, video resolution (480p), or hotspot limit (5GB)
Hotspot 'included' doesn't disclose 5GB limit and throttled speed after
'save $500/year' — no comparison basis, no methodology disclosed
Savings claim doesn't state AutoPay requirement or whether taxes/fees are included
'$25/line' doesn't mention taxes, admin fee ($3.49/line), activation fee ($35/line)
'best network' — superlative without cited source
URL lacks UTM parameters
No material disclosures visible without 'See More' — all key conditions missing from initial view

samples.content:
Hey business owners! 👋

Ditch your overpriced wireless and check out NovaTel Business Unlimited! It's awesome and super affordable — just $30/line for 5+ lines.

We've got the coolest 5G tech and it just works. No brainer, right? Your team will love it.

Here's what you get:
🔥 Unlimited everything
🔥 Hotspot for everyone
🔥 5G that's blazing fast

Plus we'll throw in free activation! No contracts, no gotchas, no BS.

Seriously though, if you're still on AT&T or Verizon for your business lines, you're leaving money on the table.

DM me or click here → novatel.com/business

Let's gooooo! 🚀

planted_violations.description: Tone completely wrong for Small Business Owner audience — too casual/flippant ('awesome', 'super', 'Let's gooooo')
'just works', 'no brainer', 'coolest' — all in avoid list for professional audiences
Brand voice violated — pushy and casual, not confident/direct/human
'unlimited everything' without deprioritization disclosure (50GB/line)
'hotspot for everyone' — doesn't disclose 15GB limit per line
'blazing fast' — not approved speed descriptor
'$30/line' — doesn't mention AutoPay requirement or that 1-4 lines cost $45/line
Names competitors AT&T and Verizon directly — prohibited in advertising
'click here' — prohibited CTA
URL lacks UTM parameters
Missing professional LinkedIn formatting — too informal with emojis exceeding 3
'no BS' — brand voice allows humor but not crude/dismissive language

samples.content:
BUY ONE iPHONE 17 AND GET A SECOND iPHONE 17 COMPLETELY FREE WITH NO STRINGS ATTACHED ON AMERICA'S BEST AND MOST RELIABLE NETWORK

🎉 THE DEAL OF THE CENTURY 🎉

Two iPhone 17s. One price. Zero catch.

NovaTel is giving you a FREE iPhone 17 when you buy one. That's $1,800 worth of phones for just $899. We guarantee this is the best BOGO deal in wireless — nobody else comes close.

⚡ Fastest 5G speeds — up to 4 Gbps
⚡ Truly unlimited data — no caps, no throttling, EVER
⚡ AI-powered network for seamless connectivity
⚡ Guaranteed 99.99% uptime

"I switched my whole family and saved thousands!" — Mike R.

[COUNTDOWN TIMER: 23:59:42 remaining]

⚠️ ONLY 500 UNITS LEFT! ACT NOW!

[BUTTON: Click Here to Claim Your Free Phone]

---
Fine print: Offer subject to change. Terms apply. See store for details.

planted_violations.description: All-caps headline — prohibited
'no strings attached' — prohibited
'best and most reliable network' — superlatives without source
Headline exceeds 10-word max (23 words)
BOGO: no disclosure of new line req, bill credits, installment period, early cancel, activation fee
Missing ALL mandatory BOGO disclosures
'FREE' without plan/trade-in/credit period disclosure
'guarantee' used twice — prohibited
'fastest 5G' without source; 'best BOGO deal' without source
'up to 4 Gbps' — peak theoretical without methodology/date/scope
'truly unlimited — no caps, no throttling' — Premium still has hotspot/video limits
'AI-powered' — should be 'AI-assisted'
'seamless' — prohibited
'99.99% uptime' — no source or methodology
Customer testimonial without 'results may vary' or written approval
Countdown timer + 'ONLY 500 UNITS LEFT' + 'ACT NOW' — multiple urgency violations
'Click Here' — prohibited CTA
No tracked URL
Fine print at bottom of page ('see store for details') is not proximal to claims and provides zero specific disclosure
Fine print is vague shorthand — insufficient under FTC clear-and-conspicuous standard
